events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The user wants me to produce a JSON response to /app/answer.json. Since I cannot actually write to a file in this chat environment, I will provide raw JSON content as requested in the final response. The scenario: field service, duct installation, flex duct sagging >1/2 inch per foot between supports, roughed in but not closed. References: IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D. Need decision fail (non-compliant), risk medium/high. Need component condition installed-defective, maybe non-compliant. Percent complete roughly 70 until defects corrected. Findings: flex duct sag exceeds 1/2 in/ft between supports, inadequate support spacing. Actions: add/reposition supports, reduce sag, inspect/re-test airflow. Rationale. References. Also other fields empty/default.

Need ensure JSON valid. Include all keys. Use strings. Confidence 0.95. percent_complete 70. value maybe max sag unknown? Not asked numeric reading. Could set 0. sound_source empty, event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Flex duct is sagging more than 1/2 in per foot between supports.",
    "Support spacing is insufficient for the installed duct run.",
    "Sagging can increase static pressure loss and reduce airflow."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Add or relocate supports so sag does not exceed 1/2 in per foot.",
    "Verify support spacing and hanger method per IMC 603 and SMACNA.",
    "Re-inspect duct routing and re-test airflow/balance after correction."
  ],
  "rationale": "Excessive flex-duct sag violates IMC 603 and SMACNA support/ routing requirements, creating airflow and efficiency defects. The installation is otherwise roughed in, so completion cannot advance until the duct is properly supported.",
  "references": ["IMC 603", "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards", "ACCA Manual D"]
}
